info.title: Top2000.Apps.CLI
info.description: A Command line interface application for the TOP 2000.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Top 2000 CLI Application. A command line interface for interacting with the Top 2000 database.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --skip-db-init
options.description: Skip database initialisation on startup [default: False]

options.name: --reset-db
options.description: Deletes and reinitialise the database on startup [default: False]

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path

commands.name: csv
commands.description: Export Top2000 data to CSV format

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path

commands.name: isam
commands.description: Export the DOS ISAM database for the Top2000

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file directory

commands.name: now
commands.description: Show the currently playing Top 2000 song

options.name: --top
options.description: Number of top tracks to show

options.name: --skip
options.description: Number of tracks to skip from the listing. If --top is specified, skip is ignored.

options.name: --take
options.description: Number of tracks to take from the listing. If --top is specified, skip is ignored.

options.name: --new
options.description: Show tracks that are new to the Top 2000 this edition [default: False]

options.name: --recurring
options.description: Show tracks that are back in the Top 2000 after being absent [default: False]

options.name: --risers
options.description: Show tracks that have increased in position from the previous edition [default: False]

options.name: --fallers
options.description: Show tracks that have decreased in position from the previous edition [default: False]

options.name: --held
options.description: Show tracks that have maintained the same position from the previous edition [default: False]

options.name: --order
options.description: Order the listing by the specified field [default: Rank]

arguments.name: year
arguments.description: Year of the edition to show

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search for tracks in the database

options.name: --showIds
options.description: Whether to show IDs in the results [default: False]

options.name: --order
options.description: Order the results by the specified field [default: Title]

arguments.name: year
arguments.description: Year of the edition to show

options.name: --edition
options.description: Specify the editions year

options.name: --position
options.description: Specify the position in the edition

options.name: --track-id
options.description: Specify the track ID

options.name: --force-all-listings
options.description: Force showing all listings even when the console width is small [default: False]

commands.name: --info
commands.description: Displays information about the application and database
